plugins.verifyConditionsCmd: cd frontend && flutter pub get && (flutter analyze --no-pub lib || true) && if flutter analyze --no-pub lib 2>&1 | grep -q 'error •'; then echo 'ERROR: Found compile errors in lib/'; exit 1; fi
plugins.prepareCmd: BUILD_NUM=$(echo ${nextRelease.version} | tr -d '.' | sed 's/^0*//') && echo "BUILD_NUM=$BUILD_NUM" && sed -i "s/^version: .*/version: ${nextRelease.version}+$BUILD_NUM/" frontend/pubspec.yaml && cat frontend/pubspec.yaml | grep '^version:'
plugins.publishCmd:
mkdir -p frontend/android/app && echo "$ANDROID_KEYSTORE" | base64 -d > frontend/android/app/embbytok-keystore.jks && printf 'storePassword=%s
keyPassword=%s
keyAlias=%s
storeFile=%s
' "$ANDROID_KEYSTORE_PWD" "$ANDROID_KEY_PWD" "$ANDROID_KEY_ALIAS" "$(pwd)/frontend/android/app/embbytok-keystore.jks" > frontend/android/key.properties && cd frontend && flutter build apk --release --split-per-abi && flutter build appbundle --release
